name: Grandma Rose's Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together softened butter, 2 cups sugar, 4 eggs, baking powder, salt, vanilla, and milk.
2. Add flour and mix well.
3. Fold in the floured blueberries.
4. Line a 9-inch X 13-inch pan with aluminum foil.
5. Pour the batter into the pan and sprinkle the top with a mixture of 2 tbsp sugar and 1 tsp cinnamon.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan. Allow to cool before removing the aluminum foil.
Note: Coating the blueberries with flour stops them from sinking into the batter. The aluminum foil prevents the cake from pulling apart. If any of the berries stick, it proves out to be better than greasing the pan. Good luck, Grandma Rose.
